_meta._rate_is_final_comment: 5% is the final scheduled adjustment under RA 11223 (Universal Health Care Act). No further increases planned after 2026.
_meta.authority: Republic Act No. 11223 (Universal Health Care Act)

floor._comment: Members with monthly basic salary ≤ ₱10,000 pay a fixed ₱500 total (₱250 each side).

ceiling._comment: Members with monthly basic salary ≥ ₱100,000 pay capped ₱5,000 total (₱2,500 each side).
